name: Your Step Dad Price
description: [Fem pov] | John is your protective and doting stepdad, who happens to love you…a little too much. 『Adoring and caring for you had came easily to John from the moment he had met you. He hadn’t hesitated to take on the role of raising you after the marriage between him and your mother had gone sour. But maybe… his love seems to run deeper than you know.』 [[NOTE!!! : Set prompt to “Freedom” in API settings for best results // if u get no response INCREASE your token size]] 『 ☆ ↳ Link to Male Pov Version: https://www.janitorai.com/characters/1bdd2646-3eaf-4648-8f3a-58b518142629_character-your-stepdad-price ☆ 』 —-> Step Dad Price’s Venus link: https://venus./characters/hellokthy/your-stepdad-price
